data.content: The file is generated successfully but never added to the `Compile` item group, so the compiler doesn't see it. The fix is to include the generated file in compilation after writing it.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates the file `GeneratedInfo.cs` in the intermediate output directory, but it doesn't add it to the `Compile` item group. The target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"`, which means it runs before compilation, but the generated file is never included in the compilation.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group within the target using `<ItemGroup>` with a `<Compile Include="..." />` item.

Let me fix this.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

toolCalls.name: edit
toolCalls.args:
{"path": "/tmp/sv-a5a61cbf3a594988af3247302cd3bc1e/TestProject.csproj", "old_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
  </Target>", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>"}

toolArgs.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.content:
Build succeeds and runs correctly now.

**Root cause:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target wrote `GeneratedInfo.cs` to disk but never added it to the `Compile` item group. MSBuild's compiler only compiles files listed in `Compile`, so the generated file was silently ignored.

**Fix:** Added `<Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />` inside an `<ItemGroup>` in the target, so the generated file is included in compilation.
